evidence_summary: WesBank states that businesses can rent different types of business vehicles, with a maintenance option or otherwise, from single vehicles to entire fleets.
WesBank publishes fleet solutions covering fleet funding, procurement, fleet management and disposals.
Standard Bank describes Full Maintenance Rental as a comprehensive finance and maintenance package without ownership and states customers pay for use over a specified period and kilometres.
Standard Bank states that customers can choose the Operating Rental option if they want to exclude maintenance management.
Absa states that with finance lease it purchases an asset and the customer leases it from Absa, with an option to buy at the end of the lease period.
Absa comparison page lists Operating Lease Agreement and says it provides full use of the vehicle for the lease period.
Absa business vehicle and asset finance pages disclose full maintenance leases among available packages.

Eqstra states that full maintenance leasing manages the expenses of acquiring, maintaining and administering a vehicle fleet and includes maintenance, servicing and tyre replacements in the monthly lease payment.
Merchant West states its Full Maintenance Lease covers a fixed period or mileage and includes procurement, maintenance and disposal support.
Merchant West states that an Operating Lease lets a business use vehicles for an agreed term, typically 12 to 60 months, with fixed rentals and no residual risk.
Merchant West describes Dynamic Lease as a lease-to-own structure with ownership transferring after all contractual payments are made.
Avis Fleet lists Full Maintenance Lease as an offering and positions it around outsourcing fleet purchasing and management.
FleetAfrica describes Full Maintenance Lease as a comprehensive vehicle leasing solution with fixed rentals and says it takes ownership, maintenance and residual value risks.
NedFleet states its speciality is Full Maintenance Leasing and Operating Rentals.
NedFleet states its speciality is Full Maintenance Leasing and Operating Rentals.
Bidvest Bank fleet finance page lists Full Maintenance lease and says the bank purchases fleet vehicles based on business requirements.
Bidvest Bank says its fleet management system collects information related to vehicle roadworthiness, tyre health, fuel and driver behaviour.
CFAO Mobility states customers can buy, lease or rent fleet vehicles and lists flexible leasing and finance options.
Pace Fleet Services describes itself as a South African car leasing company specialising in subscription-based Owner-Operator Programmes.
Avis iLease advertises flexible monthly car leasing in South Africa with no balloon payments, large deposits or hidden costs.
Imperial Truck Rental says it provides Full Maintenance Rentals over various yearly periods, including maintenance, servicing and support.
Imperial Truck Rental states it expanded its offering to include full maintenance rentals and operating leases.
Spartan Truck Hire states its fleet leasing and management division provides vehicle finance and maintenance packages to corporate and commercial enterprises.
Value Logistics states vehicles are available on flexible rental structures including daily, weekly, monthly and full maintenance lease options.
Power Truck Hire states it offers a complete truck leasing and management service providing financing and maintenance packages.
Elite Truck Hire states it offers short-term rentals, full-maintenance leasing and specialised vehicle support services nationwide.
g-FleeT states its Full Maintenance Lease solution incorporates vehicle acquisition, maintenance, disposal and replacement of a vehicle leased for a fixed period.
Vuswa states that it provides cost-effective, comprehensive leasing and fleet management services to the public and private sectors.
Fleet Horizon states its Full Maintenance Lease allows the client to choose a vehicle for an agreed period and distance at a fixed monthly rental, with the asset returned at contract end.

product_name: Customised Leasing and Fleet Management Solutions
evidence_summary: U-Rent states that it offers customised leasing and fleet management solutions based on business needs, vehicle operating conditions and expected monthly utilisation.
Amasondo lists fleet solutions including Rent or lease, fuel optimisation, driver solutions and maintenance solutions.
